consent_mode_step.title: Decide how Google uses your data
consent_mode_step.message: Choose how Google can collect and use your data for a better browsing experience on our site. Your privacy is paramount, and you have full control here.
consent_mode_step.analytics_storage_description: Allow Google Analytics to measure how I use the site to enhance functionality and service.
consent_mode_step.ad_storage_description: Permit Google to save advertising information on my device for better ad relevance.
consent_mode_step.ad_user_data_description: Share my activity data with Google for targeted advertising.
consent_mode_step.ad_personalization_description: Customize my ad experience by allowing Google to personalize the ads I see.
consent_mode_step.functionality_storage_description: Allow Google to store my functional preferences on the website for better relevance when I return.
consent_mode_step.personalization_storage_description: Allow Google to store my activity data to show me personalized suggestions.
consent_mode_step.security_storage_description: Allow Google to store specific data to ensure user security.

service.gpcPopoverTitle: We've tuned in to a GPC signal from your browser
service.gpcPopoverDescription: Your browser or extension sent us a Global Privacy Control signal, asking for no tracking. We've got your back!
service.dontSellMyData: Don't sell or share my data

content.rights:
In accordance with Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, regarding the data we collect on you, you have the following rights:

  • right of access (article 15 of the GDPR)
  • right of rectification (Article 16 of the GDPR)
  • right of cancellation (Article 17 of the GDPR)
  • right to limitation of treatment (Article 18 of the GDPR)
  • right to notify: rectifications, deletions, limitation (Article 19 of the GDPR)
  • right to data portability (Article 20 of the GDPR)
  • right of objection (Article 21 of the GDPR)
  • right not to be profiled (Article 22 of the GDPR)
